transactions.desc: The Tigers activated Madden (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Tigers optioned Vanasco to Triple-A Toledo on Monday.
The Diamondbacks reinstated Smith (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Monday, Aaron Hughes of SI.com reports.
The Giants selected Ramos' contract from Triple-A Sacramento on Monday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Diamondbacks optioned Tawa to Triple-A Reno on Monday, John Gambadoro of Arizona Sports 98.7 FM reports.
The Marlins selected Zuber's contract from Triple-A Jacksonville on Monday.
The Marlins optioned White to Triple-A Jacksonville on Monday.
The Marlins selected Brzykcy's contract from Triple-A Jacksonville on Monday.
The Reds recalled Arroyo from Triple-A Louisville on Monday.
The Reds selected Leibrandt's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Monday.
The Reds designated Marte for assignment Monday.
The Astros optioned VanWey to Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday.
Atlanta optioned Molina to Triple-A Gwinnett on Monday.
Milbrandt has been promoted from Double-A Pensacola to Triple-A Jacksonville, Craig Mish of FanDuel Sports Network Florida reports.
The Pirates optioned Sanders to Triple-A Indianapolis after Sunday's 9-3 win over the Twins.
The Guardians returned Pallette to the White Sox on Sunday.
Enns cleared waivers and accepted an outright assignment to Triple-A Norfolk on Sunday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Cardinals designated Pushard for assignment Sunday.
The Cardinals recalled Dobbins from Triple-A Memphis on Sunday, Jeff Jones of the Belleville News-Democrat reports.
The Dodgers optioned Gervase to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Sunday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.
The Dodgers activated Dreyer (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Sunday, Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic reports.
The Giants optioned Brennan to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Giants designated Borucki for assignment Sunday.
The Giants recalled Beck from Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday.
The Royals optioned Cerantola to Triple-A Omaha on Sunday.
The Royals reinstated Strahm (knee) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Tigers optioned Workman to Triple-A Toledo on Sunday.
The Pirates recalled Sanders from Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday.
The Twins selected Paredes' contract from Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
The Twins recalled Adams from Triple-A St. Paul on Sunday.
